name: Sinchao Metals Corp.
description: Sinchao Metals Corp. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration company primarily focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of precious and base metal properties. The company's flagship asset is the Sinchao property, located in the Cajamarca province of Northern Peru. Situated approximately 30 kilometers from the Yanacocha gold mine, one of the largest gold mines in South America, the company aims to leverage its strategic location to identify and develop significant mineral resources. Sinchao Metals Corp. is publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol SMZ.
